standard: Guide to Road Design Part 3: Geometric Design (AGRD03)
notes: Current edition: AGRD03-16, Edition 3.4, published 26 Feb 2021, ISBN 978-1-922382-15-3. Publication page labels the download 'PDF (free)'. Direct download link is https://austroads.gov.au/publications/road-design/agrd03/media/AGRD03-16_Guide_to_Road_Design_Part_3_Geometric_Design_Ed3.4.pdf but navigating to it (in a real browser past Cloudflare) redirects to the Austroads 'Login to your account' / 'Create a new account' page. A direct curl/fetch of the media URL returns HTTP 403 (Cloudflare + login gate). The PDF is free of charge but requires a free Austroads account login to download. Per task rules, account creation/login is not performed -> needs_manual. No payment/paid order involved.
